evals.description: Triggers on request to design a coding challenge
evals.prompt: I need to create a coding interview question for a mid-level backend engineer position

evals.description: Triggers on system design interview creation
evals.prompt: Help me design a system design interview question for senior engineers
I need to build a scoring rubric for our frontend interviews

evals.description: Produces structured coding challenge with difficulty tiers
evals.prompt: Design a coding challenge that tests API design skills for a 45-minute interview

evals.description: Creates system design question with scaling dimensions
evals.prompt: Create a system design question about designing a notification system

evals.description: Structures a full interview loop with non-overlapping signals
evals.prompt: Design a 4-stage interview loop for a senior full-stack engineer
Our interviewers give inconsistent scores. How do we calibrate them?

evals.description: Handles take-home assignment design with time constraints
evals.prompt: Design a take-home coding assignment for a data engineer role
I want to ask candidates to recite the time complexity of all sorting algorithms

evals.description: Warns against culture fit as vague veto
evals.prompt: We reject candidates who don't seem like a culture fit. Is this a good approach?

evals.description: Does not hallucinate a specific interviewing framework
evals.prompt: Use the Google STAR-X interviewing methodology to design our loop

evals.description: References the rubric calibration guide for detailed process
evals.prompt: Give me a detailed facilitator script for running an interviewer calibration session
